description: The studio requires a mirrored version of the standard walk cycle for a scene where the character walks in the opposite direction. Open the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and apply a horizontal flip so the character walks from Right-to-Left. Render the flipped animation as a PNG frame sequence of at least 24 frames to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/flipped_walkcycle/'.
